Управление фермой в одном кабинете: Manage your farm from one dashboard
Войдите, подключите Zigbee2MQTT и собери: Sign in, connect Zigbee2MQTT and create your first zone. GrowerHub is free to use and does not require a card.
home.title: GrowerHub — small farm management platform
home.description: GrowerHub brings extensive greenhouse automation experience together in one platform: Zigbee devices, zones, sensor history and control scenarios.
Большой опыт автоматизации — в одной пла: Extensive automation experience in one platform
Открыть код на GitHub и поддержать проек: Open the code on GitHub and support the project with a star
Пошаговые материалы по Zigbee, Home Assi: Step-by-step guides to Zigbee, Home Assistant, sensors and safe irrigation.
articles.title: GrowerHub guides — sensors, irrigation and automation
articles.description: Practical GrowerHub guides to automated watering, sensors, Zigbee2MQTT, Home Assistant and small farm automation.

Не удалось загрузить материал. Обновите: The guide could not be loaded. Please refresh the page.
Войдите, настройте Zigbee2MQTT и увидьте: Sign in, configure Zigbee2MQTT and see device metrics in your dashboard. If you need help, message us in Telegram in Russian or English.
Материал сопровождается публичной истори: This guide is accompanied by a public development history and a clear account of operational data. It does not mean that we have tested every device mentioned.
about.title: About GrowerHub — irrigation and climate control
Поможем с подключением и настройкой: We can help with connection and setup
Если что-то не подключается или хочется: If something does not connect or you want help with a feature, message us in Telegram. The GrowerHub team can help at any step in Russian or English.
equipment.title: Equipment for GrowerHub — accessible Zigbee options
equipment.description: What you need for GrowerHub: a Zigbee coordinator, one temperature and humidity sensor and, for control, a Zigbee smart plug.
Если всё уже работает: If your setup is already running
Главное — выбрать Zigbee: The key is to choose Zigbee
Почему не любой Wi‑Fi-датчик: Why not every Wi-Fi sensor works
В карточках отдельно указано, что работа: Each card distinguishes equipment used in the GrowerHub installation from models recommended through official Zigbee2MQTT compatibility. A successful check is not a blanket guarantee for every white-label revision of a model.
Контур полива GrowerHub развивается с ок: GrowerHub's irrigation path has been evolving since October 2025: Git contains the first MQTT commands, while the production journal retains entries from November 26. The current Zigbee/Wi-Fi prototype is a separate next generation, so we do not present that entire period as a test of one model.
Начните с оборудования и зон; растения и: Start with equipment and zones; plants and optional settings can be added later.
Все названия и значения вымышлены. На эк: All names and values are fictional. The screens contain no real addresses, IEEE identifiers, logins or credentials.
Мы рядом, если понадобится помощь: We are here if you need help
Напишите нам в Telegram — поможем подклю: Message us in Telegram — we can help connect equipment, explain features and set up GrowerHub for your farm in Russian or English.
Начните самостоятельно с координатора и: Start with a coordinator and one sensor. Add zones and automations gradually.
Синтетический обзор двух зон GrowerHub: Synthetic GrowerHub overview of two zones
готов к настройке после назначения датчи: ready after assigning a sensor and pump
Обзор двух зон GrowerHub на синтетически: GrowerHub overview of two zones with synthetic data
История температуры и влажности GrowerHu: GrowerHub temperature and humidity history with synthetic data
Подключение Zigbee-координатора GrowerHu: GrowerHub Zigbee coordinator connection with synthetic data
Проектируем два режима: Zigbee для общей: We are developing two modes: Zigbee for the shared device network and Wi-Fi with direct GrowerHub MQTT. Both work in the same platform dashboard.
Прототип проходит испытания. Если хотите: The prototype is being tested. If you would like to join the first users, message us to discuss your equipment and use case.
Стать одним из первых пользователей: Become one of the first users
Расскажите, где планируете использовать: Tell us where you plan to use the pump. We will answer questions and help you prepare for the first tests.
Для мониторинга GrowerHub насос не нужен: A pump is not required for GrowerHub monitoring: a coordinator and one Zigbee sensor are enough.
Мы обновляем эту страницу. Если у вас ес: We are updating this page. If you have a question about GrowerHub or data handling, message the team in Telegram.
Адрес электронной почты и идентификатор: Email address and the identifier of the selected sign-in method, technical connection and device data, security events, zone and automation settings.
Для входа, работы платформы, защиты поль: To provide sign-in and platform functions, protect each user space, diagnose issues and respond to support requests.
Одноразовый MQTT-пароль показывается при: A one-time MQTT password is shown when credentials are created or rotated and is not stored as plain text in the GrowerHub database. Local Home Assistant credentials are entered only in the browser for the downloaded file.
Яндекс Метрика и Google Analytics 4 помо: Yandex Metrica and Google Analytics 4 help us understand visits and platform setup progress. Events include the page address, interface language and non-personal scenario parameters. We do not send email addresses, internal identifiers, IEEE addresses or MQTT credentials to analytics.
По вопросам данных и удаления аккаунта и: Use the operator contact for data or account deletion requests.
GrowerHub доступен бесплатно и без карты: GrowerHub is free to use without a card. Core functions are available now, and the device and scenario catalogue keeps growing. We will announce important changes in advance.
Для оборудования с водой и сетевым питан: For equipment involving water or mains electricity, follow electrical safety guidance, check the load and provide a physical emergency shut-off.
Если понадобится помощь, напишите нам в: If you need help, message us in Telegram. We can assist with connections, devices and feature setup in Russian or English.
